visual_description: In a dimly lit outdoor setting, a crowd of people holding umbrellas walks past a storefront with illuminated signage. The scene cuts to a man in a dark suit and tie standing in a low‑light room, gazing intently at a wall of surveillance photographs. Another man in a light shirt is seen adjusting a headset while seated, his hands raised to his ears.
